Mental health trajectories

# mental health outcomes
custom_colors = c("1" = "grey", "2" = "#F3D8C7", "3" = "#7C5B54") 

# fit models
mod1 = lmer(bpm_int ~ age + I(age^2)  * clust + age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1 + changeage + (1 | src_subject_id) + (1 | site_id_l), data = agnes_res_env_bpm_long, na.action = na.exclude, weights = weights)
mod2 = lmer(bpm_ext ~ age + I(age^2) * clust + age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1 + changeage + (1 | src_subject_id) + (1 | site_id_l),
            data = agnes_res_env_bpm_long, na.action = na.exclude, weights = weights)

# get predicted scores
preds = ggpredict(mod1, terms = c("age [all]", "clust"))
preds2 = ggpredict(mod2, terms = c("age [all]", "clust"))

# plot predicted lines for each cluster
int = plot(preds, line_size=1, show_title=FALSE) + labs(x = "Age", y = "Predicted Internalizing Score") +
  theme_minimal() + theme_classic() + scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) + scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) + 
  theme(legend.position="none") + geom_rug(alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0))
## Scale for colour is already present.
## Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.
ext = plot(preds2, line_size=1, show_title=FALSE) + labs(x = "Age", y = "Predicted Externalizing Score") +
  theme_minimal() + theme_classic() + scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) + scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) + 
  theme(legend.position="none") + geom_rug(alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0))
## Scale for colour is already present.
## Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.
# combine
ggarrange(int, ext, nrow=1)

# quad plot by sex
agnes_res_env_bpm_long$clust = as.factor(agnes_res_env_bpm_long$clust)

int_sex = ggplot(agnes_res_env_bpm_long %>% filter(!is.na(age)) %>% filter(!is.na(sex)) %>% mutate(sex = case_when(sex == 1 ~ "Male", sex == 2 ~ "Female", TRUE ~ NA_character_)), 
       aes(x = age, y = bpm_int, color = factor(clust), linetype = factor(clust), fill=clust)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x + I(x^2), se = TRUE) + 
  geom_rug(sides = "b", alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0)) +
  theme_classic() + scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) + scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) + 
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Internalizing Symptoms") + scale_linetype_manual(values = c("dashed", "solid", "solid")) + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.25, 3.25)) + facet_grid(~sex) + theme(legend.position="none")
ext_sex = ggplot(agnes_res_env_bpm_long %>% filter(!is.na(age)) %>% filter(!is.na(sex)) %>% mutate(sex = case_when(sex == 1 ~ "Male", sex == 2 ~ "Female", TRUE ~ NA_character_)), 
       aes(x = age, y = bpm_ext, color = factor(clust), linetype = factor(clust), fill=clust)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x + I(x^2), se = TRUE) + 
  geom_rug(sides = "b", alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0)) +
  theme_classic() + scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) + scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) + 
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Externalizing Symptoms") + scale_linetype_manual(values = c("dashed", "solid", "solid")) + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.25, 3.25)) + facet_grid(~sex) + theme(legend.position="none")
ggarrange(int_sex, ext_sex, nrow=2, ncol=1)
## Warning: Removed 1370 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).
## Warning: Removed 1628 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).

Risk and protective factors predicting bpm

# plot
protective_env_int = mh_env_summ_int %>% filter(Estimate < 0 & padj < 0.05)
protective_env_ext = mh_env_summ_ext %>% filter(Estimate < 0 & padj < 0.05)
protective_env_int$env_label = dplyr::recode(protective_env_int$env,
                                             "fes_org" = "Family\norganization", "fes_cohesion" = "Family\ncohesion",
                                             "familism" = "Familism", "comc" = "Community\ncohesion", "peers_prosocial" = "Prosocial\npeers",
                                             "srpf" = "Protective\nschool", "crpbi" = "Parental\nacceptance", "coi_ed" = "COI\n(education)",
                                             "coi_se" = "COI\n(soc/econ)",  "nsc" = "Neighborhood\nsafety", "pm" = "Parental\nmonitoring")
protective_env_ext$env_label = dplyr::recode(protective_env_ext$env,
                                             "fes_org" = "Family\norganization", "fes_cohesion" = "Family\ncohesion",
                                             "familism" = "Familism", "comc" = "Community\ncohesion", "peers_prosocial" = "Prosocial\npeers",
                                             "srpf" = "Protective\nschool", "crpbi" = "Parental\nacceptance", "coi_ed" = "COI\n(education)", 
                                             "coi_se" = "COI\n(soc/econ)",  "nsc" = "Neighborhood\nsafety", "pm" = "Parental\nmonitoring")
protective_env_int = protective_env_int %>%
  mutate(env_label_faceted = paste(env_label, clust, sep = "_"),
         env_label_faceted = fct_reorder(env_label_faceted, Estimate, .desc=T))
resilience_int = ggplot(protective_env_int, aes(x = env_label_faceted, y = Estimate)) + geom_point(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Estimate - 1.96 * Std..Error, ymax = Estimate + 1.96 * Std..Error),
                width = 0.2, color = "steelblue") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) gsub("_.*", "", x)) +
  facet_wrap(~ clust, scales = "free") + coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Environmental Variable", y = "Effect on Residual Internalizing Symptoms") + theme_classic()
protective_env_ext = protective_env_ext %>%
  mutate(env_label_faceted = paste(env_label, clust, sep = "_"),
         env_label_faceted = fct_reorder(env_label_faceted, Estimate, .desc=T))
resilience_ext = ggplot(protective_env_ext, aes(x = env_label_faceted, y = Estimate)) + geom_point(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Estimate - 1.96 * Std..Error, ymax = Estimate + 1.96 * Std..Error),
                width = 0.2, color = "steelblue") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) gsub("_.*", "", x)) +
  facet_wrap(~ clust, scales = "free") + coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Environmental Variable", y = "Effect on Residual Externalizing Symptoms") + theme_classic()

risk_env_int = mh_env_summ_int %>% filter(Estimate > 0 & padj < 0.05)
risk_env_ext = mh_env_summ_ext %>% filter(Estimate > 0 & padj < 0.05)
risk_env_int$env_label = dplyr::recode(risk_env_int$env,
                                       "dm" = "Discrimination", "peers_rulebreak" = "Rule-breaking\npeers",
                                       "peq" = "Peer aggression\nvictim", "fes_conflict" = "Family\nconflict",
                                       "lec_bad" = "Negative\nlife events", "asr" = "Parent\npsychopathology",
                                       "abcl" = "Second parent\npsychopathology", "nbhsoc" = "Neighborhood\ndisadv.",
                                       "adi" = "ADI")
risk_env_ext$env_label = dplyr::recode(risk_env_ext$env,
                                       "dm" = "Discrimination", "peers_rulebreak" = "Rule-breaking\npeers",
                                       "peq" = "Peer aggression\nvictim", "fes_conflict" = "Family\nconflict",
                                       "lec_bad" = "Negative\nlife events", "asr" = "Parent\npsychopathology",
                                       "abcl" = "Second parent\npsychopathology", "nbhsoc" = "Neighborhood\ndisadv.",
                                       "adi" = "ADI")
risk_env_int = risk_env_int %>%
  mutate(env_label_faceted = paste(env_label, clust, sep = "_"),
         env_label_faceted = fct_reorder(env_label_faceted, Estimate))
risk_int = ggplot(risk_env_int, aes(x = env_label_faceted, y = Estimate)) + geom_point(color = "darkred") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Estimate - 1.96 * Std..Error, ymax = Estimate + 1.96 * Std..Error),
                width = 0.2, color = "darkred") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) gsub("_.*", "", x)) +
  facet_wrap(~ clust, scales = "free") + coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Environmental Variable", y = "Effect on Residual Internalizing Symptoms") + theme_classic()
risk_env_ext = risk_env_ext %>%
  mutate(env_label_faceted = paste(env_label, clust, sep = "_"),
         env_label_faceted = fct_reorder(env_label_faceted, Estimate))
risk_ext = ggplot(risk_env_ext, aes(x = env_label_faceted, y = Estimate)) + geom_point(color = "darkred") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Estimate - 1.96 * Std..Error, ymax = Estimate + 1.96 * Std..Error),
                width = 0.2, color = "darkred") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) gsub("_.*", "", x)) +
  facet_wrap(~ clust, scales = "free") + coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Environmental Variable", y = "Effect on Residual Externalizing Symptoms") + theme_classic()

risk = ggarrange(risk_int, risk_ext, nrow=2)
res = ggarrange(resilience_int, resilience_ext, nrow=2)
risk

res

Brain-bpm moderation

dmnfpn_2waymod = lmer(bpm_int ~ dmn_fpn * clust + age_baseline_year_1_arm_1 + changeage + (1 | src_subject_id) + rsfmri_meanmotion + (1 | site_id_l) + mri_info_manufacturer, agnes_res_env_brainbpm_long %>% filter(!is.na(age)), na.action = na.exclude, weights = weights)
salfpn_2waymod = lmer(bpm_int ~ sal_fpn * clust + age_baseline_year_1_arm_1 + changeage + (1 | src_subject_id) + rsfmri_meanmotion + (1 | site_id_l) + mri_info_manufacturer, agnes_res_env_brainbpm_long %>% filter(!is.na(age)), na.action = na.exclude, weights = weights)

test(emtrends(dmnfpn_2waymod, var = "dmn_fpn", specs = "clust"))
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'pbkrtest.limit = 11256' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 11256)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'lmerTest.limit = 11256' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(lmerTest.limit = 11256)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
##  clust dmn_fpn.trend    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  1             1.260 0.567 Inf   2.224  0.0262
##  2            -2.045 1.110 Inf  -1.847  0.0647
##  3            -0.933 1.050 Inf  -0.885  0.3759
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: mri_info_manufacturer 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: asymptotic
test(emtrends(salfpn_2waymod, var = "sal_fpn", specs = "clust"))
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'pbkrtest.limit = 11253' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 11253)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
## Note: D.f. calculations have been disabled because the number of observations exceeds 3000.
## To enable adjustments, add the argument 'lmerTest.limit = 11253' (or larger)
## [or, globally, 'set emm_options(lmerTest.limit = 11253)' or larger];
## but be warned that this may result in large computation time and memory use.
##  clust sal_fpn.trend    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  1             0.746 0.569 Inf   1.312  0.1895
##  2             3.996 1.120 Inf   3.563  0.0004
##  3            -2.431 1.040 Inf  -2.328  0.0199
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: mri_info_manufacturer 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: asymptotic
summary(dmnfpn_2waymod)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: bpm_int ~ dmn_fpn * clust + age_baseline_year_1_arm_1 + changeage +  
##     (1 | src_subject_id) + rsfmri_meanmotion + (1 | site_id_l) +  
##     mri_info_manufacturer
##    Data: agnes_res_env_brainbpm_long %>% filter(!is.na(age))
## Weights: weights
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: Inf
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -5.3798 -0.4703 -0.1854  0.3074  7.1436 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups         Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  src_subject_id (Intercept) 2.12297  1.4570  
##  site_id_l      (Intercept) 0.02748  0.1658  
##  Residual                   0.62961  0.7935  
## Number of obs: 11256, groups:  src_subject_id, 6987; site_id_l, 22
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                Estimate Std. Error         df
## (Intercept)                                   2.525e+00  4.632e-01  1.751e+03
## dmn_fpn                                       1.260e+00  5.666e-01  1.107e+04
## clust2                                        7.590e-01  9.036e-02  8.755e+03
## clust3                                        5.405e-01  8.713e-02  6.401e+03
## age_baseline_year_1_arm_1                    -1.083e-01  3.865e-02  5.715e+03
## changeage                                     3.671e-02  1.150e-01  2.458e+03
## rsfmri_meanmotion                             1.604e-01  9.041e-02  6.154e+03
## mri_info_manufacturerPhilips Medical Systems -2.532e-01  1.506e-01  7.491e+00
## mri_info_manufacturerSIEMENS                 -1.040e-01  1.045e-01  6.775e+00
## dmn_fpn:clust2                               -3.305e+00  1.242e+00  1.117e+04
## dmn_fpn:clust3                               -2.193e+00  1.194e+00  1.118e+04
##                                              t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                                    5.452 5.70e-08 ***
## dmn_fpn                                        2.224  0.02618 *  
## clust2                                         8.400  < 2e-16 ***
## clust3                                         6.203 5.88e-10 ***
## age_baseline_year_1_arm_1                     -2.803  0.00508 ** 
## changeage                                      0.319  0.74963    
## rsfmri_meanmotion                              1.774  0.07613 .  
## mri_info_manufacturerPhilips Medical Systems  -1.682  0.13367    
## mri_info_manufacturerSIEMENS                  -0.995  0.35375    
## dmn_fpn:clust2                                -2.661  0.00780 ** 
## dmn_fpn:clust3                                -1.837  0.06630 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) dmn_fp clust2 clust3 a___1_ changg rsfmr_ m__PMS m__SIE
## dmn_fpn     -0.049                                                        
## clust2      -0.033  0.298                                                 
## clust3      -0.046  0.313  0.215                                          
## ag_bs__1__1 -0.836 -0.004 -0.008 -0.002                                   
## changeage   -0.515 -0.007 -0.001  0.007  0.008                            
## rsfmr_mnmtn -0.142 -0.050 -0.032 -0.059  0.122 -0.001                     
## mr_nf_mnPMS -0.083 -0.014  0.028  0.021 -0.015 -0.033 -0.023              
## mr__SIEMENS -0.108 -0.007  0.017  0.025 -0.030 -0.055 -0.020  0.499       
## dmn_fpn:cl2  0.017 -0.454 -0.681 -0.142  0.007  0.007  0.007  0.010 -0.001
## dmn_fpn:cl3  0.030 -0.471 -0.142 -0.671 -0.005  0.000  0.007  0.003  0.009
##             dmn_:2
## dmn_fpn           
## clust2            
## clust3            
## ag_bs__1__1       
## changeage         
## rsfmr_mnmtn       
## mr_nf_mnPMS       
## mr__SIEMENS       
## dmn_fpn:cl2       
## dmn_fpn:cl3  0.215
## optimizer (nloptwrap) convergence code: 0 (OK)
## Gradient contains NAs
summary(salfpn_2waymod)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: bpm_int ~ sal_fpn * clust + age_baseline_year_1_arm_1 + changeage +  
##     (1 | src_subject_id) + rsfmri_meanmotion + (1 | site_id_l) +  
##     mri_info_manufacturer
##    Data: agnes_res_env_brainbpm_long %>% filter(!is.na(age))
## Weights: weights
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: Inf
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -5.4057 -0.4683 -0.1847  0.3090  7.1665 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups         Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  src_subject_id (Intercept) 2.1211   1.4564  
##  site_id_l      (Intercept) 0.0274   0.1655  
##  Residual                   0.6292   0.7932  
## Number of obs: 11253, groups:  src_subject_id, 6986; site_id_l, 22
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                Estimate Std. Error         df
## (Intercept)                                   2.560e+00  4.624e-01  1.714e+03
## sal_fpn                                       7.462e-01  5.686e-01  1.112e+04
## clust2                                        6.231e-01  6.679e-02  5.997e+03
## clust3                                        4.168e-01  6.488e-02  2.968e+03
## age_baseline_year_1_arm_1                    -1.064e-01  3.865e-02  5.703e+03
## changeage                                     4.182e-02  1.150e-01  2.406e+03
## rsfmri_meanmotion                             1.584e-01  9.053e-02  6.155e+03
## mri_info_manufacturerPhilips Medical Systems -2.514e-01  1.505e-01  7.223e+00
## mri_info_manufacturerSIEMENS                 -1.033e-01  1.044e-01  6.524e+00
## sal_fpn:clust2                                3.249e+00  1.254e+00  1.121e+04
## sal_fpn:clust3                               -3.177e+00  1.186e+00  1.114e+04
##                                              t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                                    5.535 3.59e-08 ***
## sal_fpn                                        1.312  0.18949    
## clust2                                         9.330  < 2e-16 ***
## clust3                                         6.425 1.53e-10 ***
## age_baseline_year_1_arm_1                     -2.752  0.00594 ** 
## changeage                                      0.364  0.71611    
## rsfmri_meanmotion                              1.749  0.08028 .  
## mri_info_manufacturerPhilips Medical Systems  -1.671  0.13742    
## mri_info_manufacturerSIEMENS                  -0.990  0.35754    
## sal_fpn:clust2                                 2.592  0.00956 ** 
## sal_fpn:clust3                                -2.679  0.00739 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) sl_fpn clust2 clust3 a___1_ changg rsfmr_ m__PMS m__SIE
## sal_fpn      0.002                                                        
## clust2      -0.031 -0.049                                                 
## clust3      -0.035 -0.047  0.224                                          
## ag_bs__1__1 -0.837  0.022 -0.004 -0.007                                   
## changeage   -0.515 -0.018  0.007  0.009  0.008                            
## rsfmr_mnmtn -0.144 -0.059 -0.040 -0.073  0.120  0.001                     
## mr_nf_mnPMS -0.084 -0.026  0.046  0.031 -0.016 -0.032 -0.021              
## mr__SIEMENS -0.108 -0.014  0.021  0.040 -0.031 -0.055 -0.018  0.499       
## sl_fpn:cls2 -0.007 -0.447  0.139  0.022 -0.001  0.011 -0.002  0.001 -0.003
## sl_fpn:cls3  0.003 -0.474  0.023  0.098 -0.001 -0.005 -0.013 -0.005 -0.011
##             sl_f:2
## sal_fpn           
## clust2            
## clust3            
## ag_bs__1__1       
## changeage         
## rsfmr_mnmtn       
## mr_nf_mnPMS       
## mr__SIEMENS       
## sl_fpn:cls2       
## sl_fpn:cls3  0.215
## optimizer (nloptwrap) convergence code: 0 (OK)
## Gradient contains NAs
# get predicted scores
pred_dmnfpn = ggpredict(dmnfpn_2waymod, terms = c("dmn_fpn [all]", "clust"))
pred_salfpn = ggpredict(salfpn_2waymod, terms = c("sal_fpn [all]", "clust"))

# plot predicted lines for each cluster
dmnfpn_2wayint = plot(pred_dmnfpn, show_title=FALSE, line_size=1) + labs(x = "DMN-FPN Functional Connectivity", y = "Predicted Internalizing Score") +
  theme_minimal() + theme_classic() + scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) + scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) + 
  theme(legend.position="none") + geom_rug(alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitter(width = 0.02, height = 0))
## Scale for colour is already present.
## Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.
salfpn_2wayint = plot(pred_salfpn, show_title=FALSE, line_size=1) + labs(x = "SAL-FPN Functional Connectivity", y = "Predicted Internalizing Score") +
  theme_minimal() + theme_classic() + scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) + scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) + 
  theme(legend.position="none") + geom_rug(alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitter(width = 0.02, height = 0))
## Scale for colour is already present.
## Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.
# combine
ggarrange(salfpn_2wayint, dmnfpn_2wayint, nrow=2, ncol=1)

# 3 way interaction with age
dmnfpn_mod = lmer(bpm_int ~ dmn_fpn * age * clust + age_baseline_year_1_arm_1 + changeage + (1 | src_subject_id) + rsfmri_meanmotion + (1 | site_id_l) + mri_info_manufacturer, (agnes_res_env_brainbpm_long %>% filter(is.na(age)==F)), na.action = na.exclude, weights = weights)
salfpn_mod = lmer(bpm_int ~ sal_fpn * age * clust + age_baseline_year_1_arm_1 + changeage + (1 | src_subject_id) + rsfmri_meanmotion + (1 | site_id_l) + mri_info_manufacturer, (agnes_res_env_brainbpm_long %>% filter(is.na(age)==F)), na.action = na.exclude, weights = weights)

# plot by cluster
dmnfpn_int = interact_plot(dmnfpn_mod, pred=dmn_fpn, modx=clust, mod2=age, data=(agnes_res_env_brainbpm_long %>% filter(is.na(age)==F)), interval=T, rug=T, colors=custom_colors, line.thickness = 0.75) + 
  theme_classic() + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) + theme(legend.position = "none") + labs(x = "DMN-FPN Functional Connectivity", y = "Predicted Internalizing") + scale_linetype_manual(values =c("solid","solid","solid")) 
## Scale for linetype is already present.
## Adding another scale for linetype, which will replace the existing scale.
salfpn_int = interact_plot(salfpn_mod, pred=sal_fpn, modx=clust, mod2=age, data=(agnes_res_env_brainbpm_long %>% filter(is.na(age)==F)), interval=T, rug=T, colors=custom_colors, line.thickness = 0.75) + 
  theme_classic() + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) + theme(legend.position = "none") + labs(x = "SN-FPN Functional Connectivity", y = "Predicted Internalizing") + scale_linetype_manual(values =c("solid","solid","solid")) 
## Scale for linetype is already present.
## Adding another scale for linetype, which will replace the existing scale.
ggarrange(salfpn_int, dmnfpn_int, nrow=2, ncol=1)
